description: PayPal Pay Later integration for Standard Checkout — allows buyers to pay in installments

enable_funding.description: Enable Pay Later via script tag parameter

initialization.description: Pay Later is included in the paypal-payments component

order_creation.note: No special order payload needed for Pay Later. Standard create order payload works.
order_creation.recommendation: Use intent: CAPTURE for Pay Later transactions

messaging.description: Display Pay Later promotional messaging to inform buyers about installment options

v5_example.code: paypal.Messages({ amount: 100, style: { layout: 'text', logo: { type: 'primary' } } }).render('#paylater-message')

placement: Product pages — show on product detail pages
Cart page — show next to order total
Checkout page — show near payment buttons

best_practices: Always check eligibility before showing Pay Later button
Display Pay Later messaging on product and cart pages to increase adoption
Provide PayPal as fallback when Pay Later is not eligible
Do not alter the Pay Later experience or flow
Order amounts must be within the required range for the buyer's country
